forces.name: Fire
forces.description: The First Flame. It warms, it consumes, and it acknowledges those who walk beside it.

forces.name: Water
forces.description: The Endless Tide. Patient and endless, it remembers every reflection it has touched.

forces.name: Air
forces.description: The Whispering Sky. It speaks in breezes and carries the unspoken words of the world.

forces.name: Earth
forces.description: The Eternal Stone. Unmoving, it measures time in ages and roots the world in place.

forces.name: Spirit
forces.description: The Silent Witness. It observes what has not yet come to pass.
